content: We can reframe curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (from Topic A's ICM/RND curious agents) as a dynamic, self-pruning epigenetic regulator for episodic memory banks in neural architecture for planning agents (from Topic B). Curiosity signals do not just drive exploration—they selectively mark episodic memories of high-uncertainty, high-potential novel events for long-term retention, while automatically pruning predictable, low-value memories that clutter planning computation.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
